channel.title: January 2026 on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in January 2026 on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: ☕ The Guyana Daily Brief – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: Budget 2026 aftermath, Guyana-UK climate deals, ExxonMobil eyes Venezuela border waters, Bangladesh opening embassy in GT, fatal Demerara River Bridge crash, and more from all four papers!

item.title: 🇬🇾 Uncle Ramesh Responds – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: Uncle Ramesh breaks down Budget 2026, the UK climate partnership, ExxonMobil's production records, and reminds you WHY the PPP is the best thing since cook-up rice.

item.title: 🌴 Caribbean Daily Brief – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: IMF approves US$415M emergency aid for Jamaica, Caribbean Airlines closes Barbados hub, Venezuela aftermath reshaping regional travel, West Indies cricket, and more across the islands!

item.title: 🎬 YouTube Scripts – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: 60-second and 4-minute YouTube scripts for The Guyana Daily Brief — Saturday, January 31, 2026

item.title: 🎯 The Bounty Board – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: Community notices, events, and happenings across Guyana! Your one-stop bulletin board for what's going on!

item.title: 📢 Bam-Bam Sally's Rumor Mill – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: If yuh ain't hear it from me, it ain't worth hearing! Bam-Bam Sally got de HOT tea to close out January 2026!

item.title: 🚛 Back-a-Truck – Saturday, January 31, 2026
item.description: De people's marketplace! Fictional buy, sell, trade, and barter from all corners of Guyana. Back-a-truck and come see wha we got!
